title: Tangy Italian Beans Ribollita
description: A hearty Tuscan soup with a citrus twist, served from a tajine clay pot for a rustic romantic touch.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil in a tajine clay pot over medium heat.
Add 2 minced garlic cloves and sauté until golden and fragrant.
Stir in 1 diced medium onion and cook until translucent.
Add 2 sliced carrots and 2 chopped celery stalks, cooking for 5 minutes.
Pour in 400 grams of diced canned whole tomatoes and stir to combine.
Add 400 grams cooked cannellini beans, 100 grams chopped kale, 600 milliliters vegetable broth, 1 teaspoon dried rosemary, 1 teaspoon dried thyme, salt, and pepper to taste, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the ribollita cook uncovered for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Before serving, stir in 30 milliliters orange blossom water and 30 grams sliced katsuramuki peel for a citrusy brightness.
Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of toasted breadcrumbs for a crunchy finish.
Ladle the warm dish into bowls and garnish with a drizzle of olive oil and a twist of citrus zest.
